This '''[[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]''' belonged to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. It arrived at ''[[Red Claw]]''{{'s}} location posing as the first of corvette group [[Chemeti group|''Chemeti'']], saying the second had been "delayed", as part of a ruse to pick up pirate prisoners and a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]. During the transfer operation it was under attack by Zaarin's own TIE Defenders, but the attack was a diversion, and after it was repelled the corvette went into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Soon after the real corvettes arrived. It was only by that time that the Imperials realized that they had been deceived.

{{Ship-stub}}
